headline: Assessing Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) has drawn fresh attention after recent price moves, with the stock showing a 7.5% decline over the past month and a smaller negative total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for Colgate-Palmolive. Short term momentum has softened, with a 1 month share price return showing a decline of 7.54% and a 1 year total shareholder return showing a decline of 8.50%, contrasting with positive 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns of 18.59% and 15.15%...

headline: Fed’s Williams warns Iran war driving up inflation pressures
summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said Thursday that the Middle East war is driving up inflationary pressures and warned the process has already begun to play out.
